title: ADK-302: Intent Classification & Routing Agents
author: Google Cloud
description: Configure router agents to classify semantic intents and dispatch task execution parameters to worker sub-agents.

features.title: Supervisor Design
features.description: Design a centralized supervisor agent that processes input queries and selects downstream executors.

features.title: Intent Parsing
features.description: Apply classification prompts or vector similarities to tag messages with specialized labels.

features.title: Fallback Paths
features.description: Handle complex and unresolvable intents with grace, escalating queries to manual intervention channels.
